name: Mrs. QSE
history: Recent divorce and financial difficulties. Relationship since age 19. Has a young son and is settling child support issues. Adjusting to being alone and handling new experiences (e.g., traveling alone with her son, visiting family without a partner).
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I am late or make mistakes, others will be angry and reject me.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am aware of my mistakes but feel unable to change them, leading to unhappiness.
coping_strategies: Attempts to maintain control and avoid situations where she feels vulnerable or judged.
situation: At a birthday party, guests mention her divorce during casual conversation. Tries to maintain appearances and later continues thinking about the interaction.
auto_thought: I am responsible for being late and others will be angry with me.
behavior: Becomes strict with students to regain control, feels guilty about it, and avoids discussing it.
